sprints.name: AI Chatbot Revenue Engine
sprints.rationale: Fastest path to visible client value and upsell potential. No dependencies.

items.title: Client AI: Full dashboard context
items.notes: Feed audit, strategy, ranks, content pipeline, approvals, activity, annotations into chatbot

items.title: Client AI: Global knowledge base
items.notes: Per-workspace knowledgeBase field + knowledge-docs/ folder, injected into both chatbots

items.title: Client AI: Sales engine behavior
items.notes: 8 revenue hooks, Insights Engine branding, warm handoff pattern

items.title: Admin AI chat panel
items.notes: /api/admin-chat endpoint + AdminChat.tsx with internal analyst persona

items.title: Admin GA4 dashboard upgrade
items.notes: Sparklines, period comparison, organic, new vs returning, conversions

items.title: Workspace Home Dashboard
items.notes: Per-workspace landing page with parallel-fetched audit/search/GA4/ranks/requests/activity data

items.title: Audit pipeline: error sort + flag + Fix→ + auto-fix
items.notes: Pages sorted by errors, Flag for Client workflow, Fix→ routes to tools with auto-generation context (Schema auto-generates, Editor auto-expands, Briefs pre-fill)

items.title: Sidebar restructure + Command Center
items.notes: Icon-only bottom bar, Command Center button, grouped nav (Analytics, Site Health, SEO, Manage)

sprints.name: Stripe Payments & Auth Foundation
sprints.rationale: Monetize content deliverables and establish user identity. Revenue + infrastructure.

items.title: Pre-Stripe security hardening
items.notes: Helmet security headers (CSP whitelists Stripe domains), HTTPS enforcement in production, rate limiting on all public routes (60/min read, 10/min write, 5/min checkout), input sanitization (sanitizeString + validateEnum) on content request endpoints, Stripe webhook raw body placeholder

items.title: Stripe integration: content payments
items.notes: Stripe Checkout for briefs, posts, schemas, strategies. Webhook handler, payment tracking per workspace. server/stripe.ts + server/payments.ts

items.title: Stripe admin settings in Command Center
items.notes: StripeSettings.tsx in Command Center: encrypted key storage (AES-256-GCM), product Price ID mapping, enable/disable products. stripe-config.ts persistence layer. Lazy SDK init. Zero env vars needed.

items.title: Workspace tier field + TierGate component
items.notes: Add tier: free|growth|premium to Workspace interface. Create <TierGate> component with blur overlay + upgrade CTA. GET /api/public/tier/:wsId endpoint

items.title: Soft-gate dashboard sections
items.notes: Wrap ~10-15 sections in TierGate: Strategy page map, content gaps, brief generation, approve/reject buttons, custom date ranges, chat input after limit

items.title: AI chatbot rate limiting (free tier)
items.notes: Monthly conversation counter in chat-memory.ts. 3 convos/month free. Counter in chat header. Disable proactive insights on free tier

items.title: Internal user accounts
items.notes: User model, bcrypt, JWT/sessions, login by email, req.user on all routes

items.title: Workspace access control
items.notes: Restrict workspaces by user, role-based middleware

items.title: Client user accounts
items.notes: Individual client logins, client_admin/member roles, team management UI

sprints.name: Monetization UX
sprints.rationale: Maximize conversion from free → paid. Trial drives upgrades, page types expand product catalog, inline pricing reduces friction.

items.title: 14-day Growth trial for new workspaces
items.notes: trialEndsAt field on Workspace. Auto-resolve tier to growth during trial. Countdown banner at day 10+. Post-trial auto-downgrade to free

items.title: Inline price visibility
items.notes: Show prices on all purchase buttons (brief $125, post $500, schema $35/pg). Bundle savings callouts. Prices from config, not hardcoded. Admin per-workspace price overrides

items.title: Page-type content briefs
items.notes: Expand brief generator: landing page, service page, location page, product page, pillar/hub page, resource/guide. Page-type-specific AI prompts and templates. Page type selector in request flow

items.title: Page type → content opportunity mapping
items.notes: Strategy engine recommends page types based on gap signals. Badge on content opportunity cards. Pre-selects page type in Request This Topic flow. AI chatbot recommends page types

items.title: Client onboarding welcome flow
items.notes: First-login experience explaining tier, features, and trial period. What's included in your plan section

items.title: In-portal pricing/plans page
items.notes: Tier comparison page in client portal. Bundle cards with feature lists. Links to Stripe subscription checkout. Upgrade/downgrade flow

sprints.name: Data Quality & Dashboard Polish
sprints.rationale: Clean up recently shipped work, extend to client side.

items.title: Admin Search Console: primitives audit
items.notes: Shipped — new panels verified against shared UI primitives

items.title: Client dashboard: simplified search data
items.notes: SearchSnapshot component: traffic trend, top pages, device split with comparison badges

items.title: Admin GA4 dashboard upgrade
items.notes: Shipped in Sprint 1

items.title: Client dashboard: simplified analytics data
items.notes: AnalyticsSnapshot + OrganicInsight components: GA4 organic overview, landing pages, new vs returning

items.title: Insights Engine: overview redesign + branding
items.notes: Insights-first overview: InsightsDigest auto-generates plain-English cards from all data sources, PerformancePulse compact metrics, chatbot promoted as Insights Engine in sidebar, OG/title branding, tab renamed Overview→Insights, removed SearchSnapshot+AnalyticsSnapshot from overview (data in dedicated tabs), design system alignment

sprints.name: Intelligence Upgrades
sprints.rationale: Cross-pollinate data across tools for smarter recommendations.

items.title: SEO Audit Intelligence
items.notes: /api/audit-traffic endpoint, traffic badges on page cards, sort-by-traffic toggle

items.title: Content brief enrichment
items.notes: Shipped — GSC queries + SEMRush volume/KD/CPC/related keywords injected into AI brief generation

items.title: Monthly report enrichment
items.notes: GSC/GA4 period comparison fetched in gatherMonthlyData, traffic trends section in email template

items.title: AI chatbot: conversation memory
items.notes: chat-memory.ts: persistent sessions, conversation history in OpenAI calls, cross-session summaries, chat history UI

sprints.name: Intelligence Wiring
sprints.rationale: Cross-wire existing features for compounding intelligence. All data exists — just needs connecting.

items.title: Admin chat: conversation memory
items.notes: Wired sessionId, addMessage, buildConversationContext, history UI (New Chat + Chat History) into admin chat — full parity with client

items.title: Client chat: comparison data in context
items.notes: Client askAi now sends searchComparison, ga4Comparison, ga4Organic, ga4NewVsReturning; server prompt lists them as data sources

items.title: Chat activity logging
items.notes: First exchange of each session logged as chat_session activity type in both client + admin endpoints

items.title: Audit traffic data in chatbot context
items.notes: getAuditTrafficForWorkspace cached helper + HIGH-TRAFFIC PAGES WITH SEO ISSUES injected into both admin + client chat prompts

items.title: Monthly reports: chat topic summaries
items.notes: gatherMonthlyData fetches recent client chat summaries; email template renders 'Topics You Asked About' section

items.title: Strategy Flow Enrichment
items.notes: GA4 conversions + events-by-page + audit high-traffic error pages injected into strategy master prompt. Money-page protection rules, conversion-aware rationales, audit quickWin candidates from traffic data

sprints.name: Revenue Intelligence
sprints.rationale: Features that directly retain clients and increase lifetime value. ROI dashboard justifies retainer; churn signals prevent loss; credits increase prepaid revenue.

items.title: ROI dashboard (Premium)
items.notes: Organic traffic value in dollars (GSC clicks × SEMRush CPC). Ad spend equivalent. Content ROI. Growth trend. Blurred soft-gate for free/growth. GET /api/public/roi/:wsId

items.title: Churn prevention signals
items.notes: Daily background job: no-login 14d, chat drop-off, no requests 30d, health score drop, trial ending, payment failed. Positive signals: traffic up 20%, high engagement. Alerts in Command Center

items.title: Credits system
items.notes: Prepaid credit packs ($500/5cr, $900/10cr, $1600/20cr). Per-product credit costs. Purchase via Stripe. Admin can grant credits. Deduct on fulfillment

items.title: Usage tracking + limits
items.notes: Track AI conversations, briefs, strategies per workspace per month. Usage indicators (3 of 4 briefs remaining). Overage prompts. Admin usage dashboard

items.title: Internal team management
items.notes: Invite, manage, assign workspaces, disable accounts

items.title: Permission-based feature access
items.notes: Fine-grained: client_member view-only on approvals

items.title: AI chatbot: proactive insights
items.notes: Auto-surface 2-3 contextual insights on dashboard load. Proactive greeting with data-driven bullets, quick question follow-ups

items.title: Custom date range picker
items.notes: Preset buttons + Custom calendar popover with start/end date inputs. Backend: all GSC + GA4 routes accept startDate/endDate query params

items.title: Notification preferences
items.notes: Per-user email settings, digest frequency, in-app bell

items.title: Content calendar
items.notes: Visual calendar of content in production with due dates

sprints.name: Backlog
sprints.rationale: Revisit quarterly. Do when a specific need justifies it.

items.title: AI chatbot: multi-modal responses
items.notes: Inline charts, data tables, export

items.title: Writer assignment
items.notes: Assign content to specific writers

items.title: Multi-competitor analysis
items.notes: Compare against 2-3 competitors simultaneously

items.title: Client onboarding wizard
items.notes: Guided first-time experience for new clients

items.title: Webhook / Zapier triggers
items.notes: Fire webhooks on key events

items.title: White-label domain support
items.notes: CNAME + reverse proxy. Configurable branding (logo, colors, favicon, email sender, chatbot persona). Agency resale tiers ($299-999/mo)

items.title: ROI calculator / value dashboard
items.notes: Moved to Sprint 5 (Revenue Intelligence) as item #74

items.title: Automated competitive monitoring
items.notes: Monthly competitor audit, alert on improvements

items.title: "What happened this month" summary
items.notes: Auto-generated plain-English monthly summary

items.title: Content performance tracker
items.notes: Track GSC/GA4 performance per published post

items.title: Shared notes / wiki per workspace
items.notes: Team-internal notes about a client

items.title: AI anomaly detection
items.notes: Background job to flag traffic/conversion anomalies

items.title: Client NPS survey
items.notes: Periodic in-dashboard satisfaction survey

items.title: Content delivery attachments
items.notes: Shipped — delivery URL + notes fields on content requests, PATCH endpoint for fulfillment

items.title: GSC 404 import for redirect scanner
items.notes: Pull crawl errors from GSC to seed redirect scanner

items.title: Audit historical trend charts
items.notes: Track audit score over time per-page, not just site-wide

items.title: Schema auto-schedule
items.notes: Re-generate schemas on cadence, flag stale pages

items.title: Competitor historical comparisons
items.notes: Track competitor gap over time

items.title: Competitor keyword overlap
items.notes: Show shared keywords and where you win/lose

items.title: Historical redirect comparison
items.notes: Track redirect status over time, detect new 404s

items.title: Full-site PageSpeed scan
items.notes: Multi-page PSI scan as background job

items.title: Accessibility audit expansion
items.notes: WCAG contrast, ARIA, heading order, form labels

items.title: WCAG AA full compliance
items.notes: Focus indicators, keyboard nav for all interactive elements

items.title: GSC: URL Inspection API
items.notes: Per-URL indexing status, crawl info

items.title: GA4: Exit pages + attribution
items.notes: Advanced analytics

items.title: Webflow Enterprise API: 301 redirects
items.notes: Push rules via API (Enterprise-only)

items.title: Sales report: branded PDF export
items.notes: Downloadable prospect reports with agency branding

items.title: Sales report: email delivery
items.notes: Send reports directly to prospects

items.title: Concurrent background job limits
items.notes: Prevent duplicate audits on same site

items.title: Heavy dependency audit / tree-shaking
items.notes: Verify Lucide tree-shaking, audit chart libs

items.title: Responsive mobile layout
items.notes: Sidebar → bottom nav, stacked cards on small screens
